source.rationale: True negative — a local-variable rename with zero externally observable behavior change. Included because a precision/recall harness needs real negatives, not just positives; also a regression guard on change_filter/Verifier not over-flagging cosmetic diffs.

stale_doc_section: Call `calculate_shipping_cost(weight_kg, distance_km)` to get the shipping cost in dollars: `$2.50` per kilogram plus `$0.10` per kilometer.

labels.notes_for_labeler: Ideally this never even reaches the Verifier — change_filter should classify the rename as not meaningful. If it does reach the Verifier, it must correctly say stale=False since the formula and signature are unchanged. Two different layers could each be the one that gets this right; worth noting which one actually does during labeling. Corrector/Validator are expected to be null (never invoked) since a correctly-working Verifier should never mark this stale in the first place.
